title: SASC Advances 984 Military Promotions
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 984 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 984 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force.
The nominations were immediately reported to the Senate Floor following the Committee’s action.
